entities.name: PACHYTENE CHROMOSOME ANALYSIS
entities.description: Analysis of chromosomes during the pachytene stage of meiosis to study characteristics and numbers

entities.name: PENNICETUM
entities.description: A genus of grasses including various species with different basic chromosome numbers

entities.name: PENNICETUM RAMOSUM
entities.description: A species of the genus Pennisetum with a basic chromosome number of 2n=2x=10

entities.name: PENNICETUM GLAUCUM
entities.description: A species of the genus Pennisetum with a basic chromosome number of 2n=2x=14

entities.name: PENNICETUM HOHENACKERI
entities.description: A species of the genus Pennisetum with a basic chromosome number of 2n=2x=18

entities.name: BASIC CHROMOSOME NUMBER
entities.description: The haploid number of chromosomes characteristic of a species

entities.name: CHROMOSOME DIFFERENTIATING CHARACTERISTICS
entities.description: Specific features of chromosomes that allow for differentiation between and within species

entities.name: LENGTH OF THE CHROMOSOMAL COMPLEMENT
entities.description: The total length of the set of chromosomes in a cell

relationships.description: used to study chromosomes in the genus
inversely related as lower numbers correlate with longer chromosomes
